title: Classic Valencian Paella with Chicken
description: A traditional Spanish dish from the Valencia region, this paella recipe is made with succulent chicken, fragrant saffron, and crunchy vegetables.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic, smoked paprika, and saffron threads and cook for 1 minute.
Add the red bell pepper and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the paella rice and stir to combine with the chicken mixture.
Add the chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes.
Remove the cover and cook for an additional 5-10 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Season with salt to taste and serve hot.
